reelChapters.title: Direct the first look.
reelChapters.body: Every campaign starts with a visual signal: the frame, the pace, the story, and the reason to stop scrolling.

reelChapters.title: Make the message move.
reelChapters.body: Animated systems, sharp cuts, and rhythm-led reels turn brand ideas into moments people can feel instantly.

reelChapters.title: Shape every touchpoint.
reelChapters.body: Design and publishing work together so the brand looks coherent, active, and unmistakably present.

reelChapters.title: Build the digital stage.
reelChapters.body: Web experiences become the place where cinematic brand energy turns into action, trust, and conversion.

reelChapters.title: Launch with momentum.
reelChapters.body: Strategy, content, and media performance align into a launch engine that keeps the story moving.

agencyStory.title: About
agencyStory.body: We are a collective of creative minds, strategic thinkers, and technology enthusiasts united by a shared vision: to create extraordinary brand experiences that leave lasting impressions and drive meaningful results.
agencyStory.vision: At Lastrada, we guide our clients to achieve their marketing and sales goals through a creative path we strategically design for them.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We push boundaries and embrace cutting-edge technologies to deliver groundbreaking creative solutions.

values.title: Passion
values.description: Our team is driven by genuine passion for creative excellence and client success.

values.title: Results
values.description: Every project is designed with measurable outcomes and business impact in mind.

values.title: Global Vision
values.description: We think globally while acting locally, creating campaigns that resonate across cultures.

members.name: Abdulrahman Al-Dabea
members.bio: With over 12 years of experience in the creative and media industry, I lead dynamic teams to craft impactful visual and marketing solutions. Passionate about photography and visual storytelling, I bring ideas to life that engage and inspire audiences.

members.name: Al-Mounther Sobh
members.bio: With over 12 years of extensive experience in managing advertising campaigns, I lead projects that deliver measurable impact and creative results.

members.name: Nada Mahmoud
members.role: Art Director – Social Media Department | Creative & AI-Savvy Leader
members.bio: Over 8 years of experience in social media design and creative content development, with deep knowledge of the latest trends, design strategies, AI tools, and market insights to deliver impactful visual content.

members.name: Malak Jamal
members.bio: Up to 6 years of experience in creative design and visual content development, leveraging AI tools to produce innovative and impactful designs.

members.name: Marah Matalkah
members.role: Motion Graphic Designer | AI Video Export Specialist

members.name: Amar Bani Salameh

portfolio.title: Our
portfolio.subtitle: Discover how we turn visions into reality. Browse our latest work and see the impact of creativity on brand growth

projects.summary: A complete identity and packaging system for a beauty brand, built to feel elegant, cohesive, and memorable across every touchpoint.

cover.alt: Oliga Rose packaging design showcase by LA STRADA
cover.label: Case Study Cover

caseStudy.challenge: Oliga Rose needed a visual identity that could move beyond a logo and feel consistent across packaging, print, and digital touchpoints without losing its premium beauty character.
caseStudy.solution: LA STRADA built the brand as a cohesive identity journey, from the core mark to the full packaging direction, balancing elegance, clarity, and shelf-ready product presence.
caseStudy.ctaTitle: Have a product brand that needs this level of presence?
caseStudy.ctaBody: Let LA STRADA shape the identity, packaging, and launch story into one memorable system.

projects.title: Brand Identity | Oliga Rose
projects.description: Olga Rose was developed as a complete branding journey, starting from the core logo design and extending through to the full packaging system. Every element was carefully crafted to reflect a cohesive visual identity that communicates elegance, consistency, and brand character across all touchpoints. The result is a refined and unified brand experience that brings the Olga Rose vision to life in a clear and memorable way.

media.alt: Oliga Rose visual identity artwork by LA STRADA
media.label: Visual Identity

media.alt: Oliga Rose packaging design showcase by LA STRADA
media.label: Packaging

projects.summary: A cinematic real-estate production shaped from script and direction through filming and final edit.
projects.title: Video production | Al Ghanem Housing
projects.description: Al Ghanem Housing video project was produced as a complete end-to-end production, starting from script writing and concept development, through full execution, filming direction, and professional editing. The aim was to translate the brand’s message into a clear and engaging visual story that reflects its identity and values in a modern and impactful way.

projects.summary: A full social media ecosystem for a medical center, spanning content, reels, podcasts, publishing, and paid campaigns.
projects.title: Social Media | Al Moafah Medical Center
projects.description: La Strada manages the social media presence of Al-Maafah Medical Center in a fully integrated way, starting from establishing and professionally building the digital platforms and their visual identity, through continuous content management to ensure strong and effective engagement. The work includes producing visual content such as professional photography, reel editing, and podcast production and editing in a modern style that enhances the center’s medical message. It also covers designing all types of promotional posts in line with the center’s brand identity and objectives, publishing and managing content across platforms, as well as planning and executing paid advertising campaigns to increase reach, attract patients, and strengthen Al-Maafah Medical Center’s position as a trusted and distinguished healthcare destination.

projects.summary: A clean, trust-building visual identity system for a dental clinic in Zarqa, complete with brand usage guidance.
projects.title: Visual Identity Design | Abu Al-Rab Dental Clinic
projects.description: La Strada developed the complete visual identity for Abu Al-Rab Dental Clinic in Zarqa, creating a cohesive visual system that reflects the clinic’s professionalism and strengthens patient trust. The work included designing a modern and minimal logo that clearly represents the dental field, along with carefully selected colors and typography to ensure visual harmony and a strong, recognizable identity. In addition, a professional brand guideline was created to define the correct usage of the logo across all digital and print materials, ensuring consistency and high-quality application in every context. La Strada is distinguished in this type of work by its attention to detail and commitment to delivering a complete visual identity that combines creativity, clarity, and strong brand presence that leaves a lasting impression.

projects.summary: A full digital presence for Abu Al-Rab Dental Clinics, powered by social strategy, motion-led reels, and paid growth.
projects.title: Social Media | Abu Al-Rab Dental Clinic
projects.description: La Strada manages the social media presence of Abu Al-Rab Dental Clinics in a fully integrated way, starting from establishing professional digital platforms and building a strong medical brand presence, through daily content management and developing effective communication strategies that enhance audience engagement and trust. The work includes producing modern reels powered by motion graphics and artificial intelligence to create engaging and impactful visual content, along with designing and publishing promotional posts aligned with the clinic’s identity and marketing objectives, as well as managing paid advertising campaigns across platforms to expand reach and attract more patients. La Strada stands out as your digital partner anywhere in Jordan, accompanying brands step by step to build a strong presence and deliver real, measurable results.

projects.summary: A food and beverage photoshoot built to elevate Mega Cafe's menu and digital presence with polished product imagery.
projects.title: Photoshoot | Mega Café Jordan
projects.description: La Strada conducted a professional photoshoot for Mega Café in Jordan focused on menu items, including food and beverages, with the aim of presenting the products in the highest visual quality that highlights their appeal and uniqueness. The session emphasized showcasing each item in an attractive and professional way, capturing the fine details of both food and drinks, enhancing the café’s visual identity and supporting its digital marketing and social media presence effectively.
